title: T-056 — Default G0-G4 GateChecklistTemplates seed (NPD-f)
prompt:
# T-056 — Gate checklist defaults seed

PRD: 01-NPD-PRD.md §17.10 + prototype design/Monopilot Design System/npd/gate-screens.jsx:14-87 (GATE_CHECKLISTS constant)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Idempotent seed populating Reference.GateChecklistTemplates per tenant with the canonical G0-G4 checklist items from the gate-screens.jsx prototype GATE_CHECKLISTS constant — categories technical/business/compliance, required flags preserved.

## Implementation contract
1. Seed file packages/db/seed/gate-checklist-templates-seed.ts iterates tenants table and INSERTs per-gate items with ON CONFLICT (tenant_id, template_id, gate_code, sequence) DO NOTHING; default template_id='APEX_DEFAULT'.
2. Items mirror GATE_CHECKLISTS prototype constant (G0=4 items, G1=5 items, G2=6 items, G3=8 items required, G4=6 items required); categories preserved.
3. Hook into seed orchestrator packages/db/seed/index.ts.
4. CLI 'pnpm --filter db seed:gate-checklist-templates'.

## Files
- packages/db/seed/gate-checklist-templates-seed.ts [create]
- packages/db/seed/index.ts [modify]
- packages/db/package.json [modify]
- packages/db/__tests__/gate-checklist-templates-seed.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given a fresh DB with one apex tenant, when seed:gate-checklist-templates runs, then 5 gates × N items rows exist (matching GATE_CHECKLISTS counts in design/Monopilot Design System/npd/gate-screens.jsx:14-87) per §17.10
2. Given the seed has already run, when it runs again, then row count is unchanged (idempotent ON CONFLICT)
3. Given a G3 row exists, when its 'required' flag is queried, then it is TRUE for all 8 items (G3 fully gated per §17.6 approval contract)

## Test strategy
- RED: integration test asserting per-gate item counts + required flag for G3 + idempotency before seed exists
- Run 'pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db seed:gate-checklist-templates && pnpm --filter db test gate-checklist-templates-seed'

## Risk red lines
- Do not deviate from GATE_CHECKLISTS prototype item text (parity required)
- Do not skip ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
- Do not seed only one tenant
